exec_args.query: SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table';
SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public';

args.query: SELECT filing_date, grant_date, Patents_info, title_localized, cpc FROM publicationinfo WHERE grant_date IS NOT NULL AND (grant_date LIKE '%2019%' ) ;

exec_args.sql: SELECT filing_date, grant_date, Patents_info, title_localized, cpc FROM publicationinfo WHERE grant_date IS NOT NULL AND (grant_date LIKE '%2019%' ) ;

result.preview: "No results found: after filtering to patents from Germany (country_code inferred from Patents_info), granted in the second half of 2019 (grant_date July\u2013Dec 2019), there were zero records with parseable filing years and CPC codes in the provided data; therefore no level-4 CPC groups and no EMA-by-year maxima could be computed."

args.answer: No results found: after filtering to patents from Germany (country_code inferred from Patents_info), granted in the second half of 2019 (grant_date July–Dec 2019), there were zero records with parseable filing years and CPC codes in the provided data; therefore no level-4 CPC groups and no EMA-by-year maxima could be computed.

val_args.answer: No results found: after filtering to patents from Germany (country_code inferred from Patents_info), granted in the second half of 2019 (grant_date July–Dec 2019), there were zero records with parseable filing years and CPC codes in the provided data; therefore no level-4 CPC groups and no EMA-by-year maxima could be computed.
